series_metadata.series_description: The Ohio Board of Regents (“OBR”) performs enrollment audits of state-supported institutions of higher education per ORC 3333.04 (S). OBR receives paper or electronic copies of student applications, transcripts, payment history (together, “student data”) from institutions being audited. OBR creates audit workpapers and receives and sends official correspondence regarding audit issues. An audit report may be issued at the closure of the enrollment audit.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Student data and related records will be deleted or shredded as soon as the audit is completed and the data is no longer needed. Audit Workpapers and official correspondence will be retained until the annual audit by the Auditor of State is released and any related discrepancies are resolved, then delete.. The electronic/scanned audit report will be retained for 5 years. ; Electronic: Student data and related records will be deleted or shredded as soon as the audit is completed and the data is no longer needed. Audit Workpapers and official correspondence will be retained until the annual audit by the Auditor of State is released and any related discrepancies are resolved, then delete.. The electronic/scanned audit report will be retained for 5 years., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
